results.title: Very unhappy almost customer.
results.reviewText: I never received the shorts I ordered. I contacted the company and they said they would reply within six days. Eventually, I contacted them and they said I might be eligible for a refund. Eventually replied back that I was eligible for a refund. Then I had to jump through hoops to activate the refund they said I was eligible for. This is a horrible company to try to do business with. I don’t know how the shorts would be because I never was able to get them.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for sharing your experience with us. We understand that you didn't receive your Pace Breaker Lined Short 7", and that it took extra effort to receive your refund. We really appreciate your patience and thank you for bringing this to our attention.

results.title: Item never arrived
results.reviewText: I made this order on November 30th and as of December 19 they still haven’t arrived. My order says delayed; otherwise I never received any sort of update from lululemon. The item is now out of stock so I can’t reorder at discounted price. I made my original purchase during Black Friday promotion. I have received very minimal customer support on the matter so I’m left leaving a review…

results.title: Item never arrived.
results.reviewText: Item never arrived. Lululemon charged me for this item and then never shipped it. They never informed me that it would not be shipped. Apparently, Lululemon planned to simply keep my money and never deliver the goods I purchased. Only three weeks later, after I complained, did Lululemon offer to refund my purchase for the goods that they knew they never shipped and apparently did not even have available to ship at the time they were "sold" to me.

luluResponse.responseText: Thank you for sharing this experience with us. We’re truly sorry for the frustration caused by the delay and lack of communication regarding your Pace Breaker Lined Short 7". This is not the experience we want for our guests. We appreciate you bringing this to our attention, as your feedback helps us identify where we need to do better. If there’s anything further we can support you with, please don’t hesitate to reach out through our Contact Us page.

We hear that your Pace Breaker Lined Short 7" is falling apart after your first run, and we understand that’s far from ideal. We see that you’ve submitted a Quality Promise form, and our Quality Returns team will review your submission. You can expect to hear back within 7–10 business days. We truly appreciate your patience while we work through this with you.

results.title: Never received the item
results.reviewText: I still didn't receive it despite Carlos telling me he would ship a priority package which was supposed to arrive within 3 business days.

luluResponse.responseText: This isn’t the experience we strive to deliver. We’ve reached out by email so we can support you further—talk soon.

results.title: Stay away
results.reviewText: The lining caused sores ans bleeding on both legs. Something strange in the material.

luluResponse.responseText: We take situations like this seriously, so we went ahead and sent a follow-up email to help sort this out—chat soon.

results.title: Terrible quality
results.reviewText: Brand new pair had 3 snags in it after a couple hours use while golfing. Not sure how it’s possible. This has happened lots on the back or sides of these shorts but never the front for me before. Quality and durability is nothing like what it used to be.

luluResponse.responseText: We sincerely appreciate you bringing this to our attention. This certainly isn't the experience we want for you, and we'd love to continue the conversation in more detail. Stay tuned to your inbox—we'll be in touch. Chat soon.

results.title: Piling on first wear.
results.reviewText: Piling on first wear. What else is there to say.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for bringing this to our attention, we'd love to offer further support. We sent you a follow-up email to continue the conversation—chat soon.

results.title: Quality has tanked
results.reviewText: I have owned 10+ pairs of these exact shorts throughout the past 8 years or so. Usually it would take about 2 years for the lining to start to get holes in them from what Lululemon calls “general wear and tear.” I bought a pair less than 2 months ago and they already have a hole in the lining. Average wearing them around once a week so let’s call it 10-12 wears. This is clear evidence of the quality diminishing at Lululemon. Will be looking for a new running short after 10 years of loyalty.

luluResponse.responseText: Thank you for providing your honest feedback on the Pace Breaker Lined Short 7". We're disappointed to hear they didn't hold up after 2 months of wear, and we'd like to learn more. We'll be emailing you shortly, so please keep an eye on your inbox—chat soon.

results.title: Poor Customer Service
results.reviewText: I have not yet received my package / items. These things should have been delivered well over a week ago. Customer Service Support was cordial but offered no solutions as to what happened to my items and when would I be receiving either the items or a refund.

luluResponse.responseText: We understand that your Pace Breaker Lined Short 7" is lost in transit and we are currently tracking the shipment. If you do not see the item within the next 6 business days as delivered, then we will be connecting with you with next steps through email.

results.title: Fantastic!
results.reviewText: Always the best and most comfortable shorts out there!

results.title: Quality is  not what it used to be!
results.reviewText: The quality on the new version is lower than previous versions. You used to be able to move the tie inside or outside the short. Now it has to be inside and doesn’t work as well. I used to only buy this short for working out, probably 5 pairs per year. I won’t buy again

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for taking the time to share your experience with the Pace Breaker Lined Short 7". We hear your feedback about the fit and feel. Please know we value your thoughts, and your input is important to us. We're always looking for ways to innovate our designs, and improve your experience.

results.title: Wrong shorts
results.reviewText: Got the wrong shorts and wrong color.  Emailed about it and no response

results.title: Need new carrier
results.reviewText: Never received my order this is the second time it has happened to me with Lu Lu  I have sent to 2 different address so that’s not the problem. It’s fed ex.

luluResponse.responseText: We've taken a look, and see that you've been in touch with our support team at the GEC. Please feel free to reach back out if there's anything else we can lend a hand with.

results.title: Poor Durability – Lining Ripped During Second Run
results.reviewText:
I own another pair of Lululemon lined shorts that I really liked, I ran a marathon in them a few years ago, and I continue to wear them to this day. So with another marathon coming up, I decided to get a new pair of the Pace Breaker Lined Short 7".

Unfortunately, after just two runs, the lining ripped, leaving a large hole in the crotch area. The first run was just an easy run to test them out, but during the marathon, the tear caused a lot of chafing, making the rest of the run uncomfortable and the recovery worse.

For shorts marketed for “running and training,” I expected better durability. These didn’t hold up like my previous pair, and I wouldn’t recommend them for long-distance running.
